HES THE PETITIONER AS TO COMPLIANCE TO ALL COURT ORDERS. S/S TO RESPONDENT WAS AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF 500/MONTH EFF.7/1/00. ARREARS OF $200 A
MONTH SHALL BE PAID IN ADDITION TO THE S/S ORDER. COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION OVER S/S ISSUES. W/A TO BE PREPARED BY THE PETITIONER'S ATTORNEY.
